articles.author: Gregory Svirnovskiy
articles.title: Americans continue to sour on Trump’s handling of Iran war - Politico
articles.description: The polls come as the president this week signaled a pull-back on parts of the operation against Tehran.
articles.content: Republicans and Democrats remain at odds over the presidents military moves. Seventy-eight percent of Republicans told Pew that the war was going somewhat or very well, compared to 29 percent of Demo… [+1962 chars]

articles.author: Kathryn  Watson
articles.title: Melania Trump pitches robots as potential educators for American schoolchildren - CBS News
articles.description: First lady Melania Trump argued that humanoids can help children develop critical thinking skills — and robots never get impatient.
articles.content:
Washington — For the first time in history, a robot, not a person, escorted the first lady of the United States Wednesday at the White House.
